meta.siteDescription: Professional sound engineering services — studio sessions, mixing, mastering, and rehearsal space in Paris.

home.servicesSubtitle: Studio sessions, post-production, coaching, and gear rental.
home.whyText: A hybrid analog/digital workflow, fast turnarounds, and a focus on making your music translate — in the studio and on every playback system.
home.portfolioText: Credits and audio samples coming in Phase 2.
home.ctaText: Studio sessions, rehearsal space, or gear rental — pick your flow.

services.title: Services
services.description: From tracking to final master — book studio time or browse gear for rent.
services.metaDescription: Recording, mixing, mastering, lessons, production coaching, and equipment rental.

recording.title: Recording
recording.description: Capture your sound in a treated studio with pro microphones and preamps.
details: Full-band or solo sessions in a acoustically treated live room with quality mic selection and preamps.
We set levels, capture multiple takes, and comp the best performances — you leave with organized multitracks ready for mix.
Ideal for vocals, acoustic instruments, bands, and overdubs. Session length from 2 hours; full-day blocks available.

mixing.title: Mixing
mixing.description: Balance, depth, and clarity — mixes that translate on every system.
details: Stem or multitrack mixing with EQ, compression, spatial effects, and automation tailored to your genre.
Hybrid analog/digital workflow for warmth and precision. Two revision rounds included; extra rounds on request.
Delivered as WAV/AIFF; optional instrumental and acapella versions. Typical turnaround 3–7 days per song.

mastering.title: Mastering
mastering.description: Final polish for streaming, vinyl, and broadcast-ready loudness.
details: Final EQ, dynamics, and loudness optimization for Spotify, Apple Music, CD, or vinyl pre-master.
One cohesive sound across an EP or album with careful sequencing and spacing between tracks.
Includes one revision round and format-specific exports (streaming, CD, vinyl pre-master).

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.description: One-on-one coaching in recording, mixing, and production workflows.
details: Hands-on sessions in the studio or remote — mic placement, gain staging, DAW workflow, and mix decisions.
Tailored to your level: beginners learning fundamentals, or experienced producers refining their sound.
Bring your own projects for feedback, or work through exercises on studio gear. 1–2 hour sessions.

production.title: Production Coaching
production.description: Guidance on arrangement, sound design, and finishing your tracks.
details: Creative direction on structure, instrumentation, and sonic identity — from demo to release-ready.
Feedback on works in progress: arrangement, sound design, vocal production, and how to finish strong.
Flexible format — single deep-dive sessions or ongoing check-ins as your project develops.

equipment.title: Equipment Rental
equipment.description: Browse available mics, interfaces, and outboard — select what you need and send an enquiry.
details: Rent mics, interfaces, outboard compressors, monitors, and accessories by the day or week.
Pick the gear you need from our inventory, add your contact details, and send an enquiry — we'll confirm availability and rates.
Pickup at the studio or local delivery on request. Ideal for home sessions, live gigs, or supplementing your own setup.

equipment.title: Equipment rental
equipment.intro: Select one or more items below, then send an email to check availability and rates.

rehearsal.description: A treated rehearsal room for bands and solo artists. Photos coming in Phase 2.

rehearsal.equipmentValue: PA, drum kit, bass amp, guitar amp, mics
rules: Respect neighbours — no excessive volume after 10pm
Leave the room clean and cables coiled

about.title: About
about.metaDescription: Learn more about Josh Studio — experience, gear, and credits.
bio: Josh is a sound engineer with over 10 years of experience across recording, mixing, and mastering for artists, labels, and independent producers.
His studio combines analog warmth with a modern hybrid workflow — fast turnarounds without sacrificing detail.
Whether you're tracking a full band or polishing a single, the goal is the same: make your music sound like you, at its best.
about.creditsNote: Full portfolio and gear highlights — Phase 2.
